---
title: "About"
lang: en
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

## The Data Translator

My name is Arnaud Raulet. I'm a data scientist, former patent translator, and consultant based in Tokyo for nearly a decade.

My career path is not linear — and that's precisely what makes me useful.

---

## From Translation to Data

I started by translating Japanese patents for the automotive industry. That work taught me something most data scientists never learn: raw data is worthless without context. A Japanese patent is technical text. But knowing *why* IHI files 15 patents on space propulsion in 2024, what that means in the context of METI budgets, and how it affects a European competitor — that's intelligence.

I applied the same logic to marketing and business data. Most companies have data. Few have answers. My work is to bridge the two.

---

## What I Bring

**Trilingual French, Japanese, English** — I read Japanese patents in the original, I understand the cultural nuances of Japanese business, and I deliver in French or English.

**Analytical rigour** — Causal analysis, Bayesian reasoning, inference — I don't confuse correlation with causation. Every recommendation comes with a clear quantification of uncertainty.

**On-the-ground understanding** — Nearly 10 years in Japan, across industrial sectors (automotive, aerospace, defence, energy). I understand business realities as well as statistical methods.

---

## Education and Certifications

- UC Berkeley — Marketing Analytics
- Harvard — Data Science
- Specialisations: causal inference, Bayesian methods (Statistical Rethinking), Marketing Mix Modeling (Robyn)

---

::: contact-section
## Get in Touch

I'm based in Tokyo and work with clients in France, Japan and internationally.

[Book a discovery call](/contact/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}
:::
